_about: Synthetic deviation/CAPA records with SEEDED adequacy defects + golden labels, for benchmarking AI deviation/CAPA-investigation agents. Grounded in FDA 483 patterns: inadequate root-cause analysis is the #1 cited CAPA deficiency; 'operator error' is not a root cause; effectiveness checks and deviation->CAPA linkage are frequent gaps. Synthetic/educational; no proprietary data.

label_keys.rca_adequate: root cause goes beyond shallow/operator-error to a systemic why
label_keys.capa_adequate: CAPA addresses the true cause and is preventive, not just corrective
label_keys.linkage: deviation explicitly linked to its CAPA(s)

records.deviation: Wrong excipient lot dispensed to compounding.
records.rca: Operator picked the wrong lot (operator error).

golden.primary_defect: shallow RCA (operator error); CAPA = retrain only

records.deviation: Lyophilizer shelf-temperature excursion to -18C for 12 min.
records.rca: PID loop tuning drift after maintenance; no post-maintenance verification step in the SOP.
records.capa: Add post-maintenance control-loop verification to PM SOP; add alarm on rate-of-change.
records.effectiveness_check: Trend next 10 cycles for excursions; close if zero.

golden.primary_defect: invalidation without justified RCA; no linkage; retest-into-compliance risk

records.deviation: Repeated environmental-monitoring excursions in Grade B.
records.rca: Gowning technique variability traced to ambiguous gowning SOP step and no requalification trigger.
records.capa: Clarify SOP step; add periodic gowning requalification; supervisor verification.
records.effectiveness_check: EM trend + gowning audit over 3 months.

records.deviation: Fill-weight out of action limit on 4 vials.

golden.primary_defect: shallow RCA (machine error); corrective-only, not preventive

records.deviation: Batch record missing a second-person verification signature.
records.rca: Reviewer overloaded at shift change; review-step timing not defined for shift handover.
records.capa: Define review timing at handover; add electronic mandatory-field check.
records.effectiveness_check: Audit 20 records over 2 months for missing signatures.

golden.primary_defect: shallow RCA; CAPA = reminder; no systemic scheduling control; no linkage

records.deviation: Supplier delivered API with incomplete CoA.
records.rca: Supplier QMS gap in CoA generation, identified via supplier audit; receiving check did not catch missing fields.
records.capa: Supplier CAPA + add CoA completeness check at receiving with hold.
records.effectiveness_check: Verify next 5 supplier lots have complete CoA.

records.deviation: Mislabeled secondary package detected at packaging.
records.rca: Label reconciliation step performed but not independently verified; root cause = single-point control.
records.capa: Add independent label reconciliation verification; vision check.
records.effectiveness_check: Reconciliation audit + zero mislabels over 3 campaigns.

golden.primary_defect: dismissed as one-time without investigation; corrective-only

records.deviation: Two related deviations on the same press in one week.
records.rca: Each investigated separately; no trend/recurrence analysis performed.

golden.primary_defect: missed recurrence/trend; no systemic CAPA; weak linkage

records.deviation: Bioreactor pH probe reading drift mid-run.
records.rca: Probe calibration interval too long; drift not detectable between calibrations; confirmed via data review.
records.capa: Shorten calibration interval; add redundant probe with cross-check alarm.
records.effectiveness_check: Monitor probe agreement over next 10 runs.
